name: Mimura
description: Tejina-senpai's older sister's husband.

name: Minuki Naruhodou
description: Trucy Wright is Apollo Justice's "sidekick" and Phoenix Wright's adopted daughter. She is a professional stage magician born into the Gramarye family of magicians, her biological father being Zak Gramarye and her grandfather being Magnifi Gramarye. As such, her original name is Trucy Enigmar. Trucy is bright, energetic and very naïve. However, underneath all this, she is also very perceptive and intelligent, usually being able to piece things together in and out of court even more quickly than A

name: Misa Aoi
description: A first-year at Asakusa Girl's High School, Misa is a shooter who teams up with Rin to found the Kandagawa Jet Girls. She had decided to quit after middle school until Rin's passion for jet racing rekindled her interest in competing. An introvert by nature, Misa has a cool and aggressive personality and prefers keeping to herself. She is initially conflicted over racing with Rin, but gradually grows fond of her new partner.

name: Misuzu Misaka
description: Misuzu Misaka is Misaka Mikoto's mother, first appeared in volume 9 and again in volume 10, Volume SS and Volume SS2. Currently studying at a university. Mikoto often comments her mother acts more like a child than she herself does. Misuzu is very weak to alcohol, and after getting drunk she has a habit of clinging to a young guy she finds attractive. (Source: Toaru Majutsu no Index Wikia)

name: Mitsuko Souma
description: The mother of the Souma family. She is a shameless slut. All of her daughters are from different fathers, none of whom are her husband!

name: Mutsumi Sagami
description: [Masamune](https://anilist.co/character/306027/Kikuiri-Masamune)'s mysterious classmate.

name: Mydei
description: Kremnos, swallowed by mist! City riven between chaos and war! The blood of patricide flows through its royal line, and its god bears the title of calamity. The undying Mydeimos, the lion apart from the rest. O Chrysos Heir that seeks the Coreflame of Strife, you must suffer a thousand deaths, be bathed in blood on the path home, and bear the madness of fate alone, for one was must slay a god to become one. Iron-hooves pound across the wilderness for the campaign, and must eventually soak in the

name: Nagare Hisui
description: Nagare Hisui is the Fifth and Green King, and runs the Green Clan JUNGLE. He has the ability to channel himself through a green bird named Kotosaka, and use it as a medium for communication. ~!A survivor of the Kagutsu Crater incident where his heart was punctured by the debris. He was chosen as the Green King in this moment which helped preserve his life!~

name: Nagasumi Michishio
description: Nagasumi is the protagonist of the story. Nagasumi is likely the only one in his family who has a clear head, apart from his grandmother. When push comes to shove, Nagasumi demonstrates large inner strength. (Wikipedia)

name: Nao Ishiwatari
description: Makoto's classmate as well as Kei's childhood friend. She helps out with her parents liquor store for some extra money.

name: Neon Nikaidou
description: Shion's sister and main enemy from the in-story anime 'Flower Princess Blaze'.

name: Nori
description: __Height:__ 160 cm Nori lives in room 103 and is in the art department and likes to play with computers. She is honest and straightforward, and seems to be the most level-headed and normal out of everyone and is usually the one to point out the others' weird ways.

name: Oboro Iga
description: __Love Interest:__ Gennosuke Kouga __Ninja Abilites:__ Mystic Eyes Oboro is selected as one of the ten Iga clan members that will oppose and fight the Kouga. She gains leadership of the clan after her Grandmother, Ogen, dies. ~!Soon to be replaced by Tenzen, who considered her incapable of leadership because of her passive demeanor. name: Paco Laburantes
description: __Stand:__ The Hustle Paco is a gangster working in the same gang as Jodio and Dragona Joestar. They are assigned to the same team in order to steal a diamond. Paco is a Stand User possessing The Hustle, an integrated Stand that allows him to grab objects with his muscles anywhere on his body.

name: Rajak Kertia
description: Age: unknown (>500) Race: Noble Occupation: Kertia clan leader Eye colour: Red Hair colour: Blonde Rajak is the head of the house of Kertia, a clan of murderers, and Rael’s older brother. His soul weapon is Kartas and it takes the form of two daggers, the same as his younger brother’s soul weapon Grandia. name: Reiji
description: __Height:__ 165cm A mysterious boy Sei Iori encounters in town. He's pushy, selfish, quarrelsome, and doesn't really understand common sense. By chance, he ends up participating in a Gunpla battle, and despite it being his first time, he shows off his outstanding piloting skills.

name: Rika Ichinose
description: Rika Ichinose is one the main heroines of the Ao no Kanata no Four Rhythm visual novel game and one of the main characters of the anime series. She is an honor student who attends a different school than Masaya Hinata, but they are neighbors. Rika is a kind honor student, even though she acts tough and serious. name: Rikiel
description: Rikiel is a young, decently built man with a long face. He has dark hair styled into several dreadlocks. He wears a sleeveless and hooded bodysuit patterned after the hide of a stereotypical cow with an opening on his chest. He wears an assortment of arm warmers. (Source: JoJo's Bizarre Encyclopedia)

name: Ryouko Otonashi
description: __Talent:__ Ultimate Analytical Prowess The protagonist of the Danganronpa/Zero novels. Ryouko is presented as a girl with a neurological disorder which causes her to lose her short and long term memories. Because of this, she writes everything down in a notebook, the "Ryouko Otonashi Memory Notebook".
